svg.title: Sanitized colored intel-features terminal output
svg.desc: A privileged report with selected identifying and inventory values realistically modified for privacy.
svg.text: intel-features 0.1.0
CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM) Ultra 9 285K
Vendor: GenuineIntel family 0x6 model 0xc6 stepping 2
Generation: Arrow Lake — Core Ultra Series 2 (client)
Topology: 24 logical, hybrid: 8 P-core(s) + 16 E-core(s)
System: Example OEM Z890 Workstation (board EXAMPLE-Z890-PRO)
BIOS: Example OEM 2.14.0 (06/18/2026)
Privilege: root (availability still depends on host interfaces and namespaces)
Instruction Set Extensions
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
• SSE2 present cpuid, procfs 128-bit double-precision and integer SIMD; x86-64 baseline
• AVX2 present cpuid, procfs 256-bit integer SIMD, gathers, shifts, and permutations
• AVX-VNNI present cpuid, procfs Integer dot products for inference and DSP
• AES-NI present cpuid, procfs AES encryption/decryption rounds and key generation
• SHA-NI present cpuid, procfs Hardware SHA-1 and SHA-256 operations
Security
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
• NX / XD present cpuid, procfs No-execute page protection
• SMEP present cpuid, procfs Supervisor-mode execution prevention
• CET Shadow Stack present cpuid, procfs Return-address protection
• TPM present linux-sysfs, acpi Trusted Platform Module device present
✓ Spectre v2 enabled mitigated Branch-target injection protection
Virtualization
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
✓ VT-x (VMX) enabled cpuid, procfs, msr Hardware virtualization
✓ KVM usable enabled linux-sysfs /dev/kvm present and openable
✓ VT-d (IOMMU) enabled acpi DMA remapping / IOMMU
• EPT present procfs, msr Second-level guest address translation
Power & Thermal
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
✓ HWP / Speed Shift enabled cpuid, procfs, msr Hardware-managed P-states
• TjMax present 105 °C Thermal throttle temperature
• Package TDP present 125 W Thermal design power
• SMI Count present 2,184 SMIs System Management Interrupts seen
✓ RAPL powercap enabled linux-sysfs Power-limit domains exposed
Topology
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
• x2APIC present cpuid, procfs Extended interrupt-controller addressing
• Hybrid cores present cpuid P-core / E-core hybrid topology
✗ SMT / Hyper-Threading disabled linux-sysfs Simultaneous multithreading state
• Invariant TSC present procfs Constant-rate timestamp counter
Performance Monitoring & Trace
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
• Arch PerfMon present cpuid, procfs Architectural performance-monitoring unit
• PEBS present procfs Precise event-based sampling
• Intel PT present cpuid, procfs Processor execution tracing
• Arch LBR present cpuid, procfs Architectural last-branch records
Resource Director Technology (RDT)
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
• RDT Allocation present cpuid, procfs Cache and memory-bandwidth allocation
On-SoC Accelerators & Engines
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
✓ Integrated GPU enabled dev 0x7d66, driver xe Integrated graphics
✓ NPU / VPU enabled dev 0xad1c, driver intel_vpu Neural/AI accelerator
Chipset & Platform Devices
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
✓ Ethernet enabled dev 0x125d, driver igc Integrated Ethernet controller
✓ Wi-Fi enabled dev 0x272c, driver iwlwifi Wireless networking
✓ Thunderbolt / USB4 enabled thunderbolt High-speed peripheral connectivity
• Installed Memory present 2 populated: 48 GB DDR5-5600, 48 GB DDR5-5600 Populated DIMMs
Platform & Firmware
Feature Status Evidence Purpose / notable instructions
✓ MSR access enabled msr Privileged register interface readable
✓ FEATURE_CONTROL lock enabled msr Feature-control register locked by firmware
• Boot Guard present SACM_INFO = 0x620000006f Verified/measured-boot capability register
✓ UEFI Boot enabled efi Booted via UEFI
✗ Secure Boot disabled efi UEFI Secure Boot state
✓ ESRT / Capsule Update enabled efi Firmware capsule-update support
Privacy notice: selected identity, inventory, counter, power, PCI, and firmware values were realistically modified.
